title: Vibrant Resinous Algerian Chuck Roast Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Algerian dish featuring a tender chuck roast, this tagine is perfect for special occasions. The resinous flavors come from a blend of aromatic spices and herbs.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chuck roast with salt, black pepper, cumin, coriander, and cinnamon.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium high heat.
Sear the chuck roast until browned on all sides, then remove from the pot.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and cook for an additional minute.
Return the chuck roast to the pot and add enough water to cover the roast.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the tagine for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the tagine cool slightly before slicing the roast.
Serve the tagine on a wooden board, garnished with fresh herbs.
